close_reason: Implemented queue lease before dequeue. Manager now obtains queue lease first via Store.obtain_queue_lease, skips if already leased by another consumer.
description:
**QuiCK Paper Reference:** Algorithm 2, line 1: `if not id ← obtain_lease(p, p_duration) then return CONFLICT`

**Current Behavior:**
Manager.process_queue/3 directly calls Store.peek + Store.obtain_lease without first obtaining a queue lease. Multiple consumers can race to dequeue from the same queue simultaneously.

**Expected Behavior (per QuiCK):**
Two-tier leasing: First obtain exclusive queue lease, THEN dequeue items. This prevents thundering herd on hot queues.

**Code exists but unused:**
- `Store.obtain_queue_lease/6` is implemented
- `QueueLease` struct exists
- Manager doesn't call it

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/consumer/manager.ex`

**Risk:** Medium - Thundering herd on popular queues, wasted work from lease conflicts
title: Manager should obtain queue lease before dequeuing
